title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
summary: Amazon is investing an additional $5 billion in Anthropic, with Anthropic committing to spend $100 billion on AWS services in return. This represents another circular investment deal between the two companies, underscoring the strategic importance of AI capabilities to cloud providers.
content: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.

zh.title: Anthropic从亚马逊获得50亿美元投资，承诺回报1000亿美元云服务支出
zh.summary: 亚马逊向Anthropic额外投资50亿美元，Anthropic承诺在AWS服务上花费1000亿美元作为回报。这代表了两家公司之间另一笔循环投资交易，强调了AI能力对云服务提供商的战略重要性。

title: The Lenovo Legion Go S is RAMageddon’s latest victim
summary: Lenovo's Legion Go S handheld gaming device has experienced dramatic price increases since launch, with some models now costing nearly double their original $829.99 price, reaching $1,579.99 at Best Buy. The price hike exceeds even the Legion Go 2's increases, reflecting broader supply chain pressures in the handheld gaming market.
content:
You can still find the Asus Xbox Ally X and the MSI Claw 8 AI Plus for $999 and $1,049 respectively, but Lenovo's Legion Go S has seemingly given up the fight. The best version of Lenovo's 8-inch handheld now costs nearly double what it did at launch - originally $829.99 last summer, the SteamOS version with Z1 Extreme chip now costs a staggering $1,579.99 at Best Buy. 
That's an even bigger price hike than with Lenovo's flagship Legion Go 2, which saw up to a $650 price hike early this month. 
Not every Legion Go S model costs nearly double what it did before, but none are anywhere near what they originally cost. The Windows Z1 Extreme mo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 联想Legion Go S成为"RAMageddon"最新受害者
zh.summary: 联想Legion Go S掌上游戏设备自发布以来价格大幅上涨，某些型号的价格现已接近原价829.99美元的两倍，在Best Buy达到1,579.99美元。这一涨幅甚至超过了Legion Go 2的涨幅，反映了掌上游戏市场更广泛的供应链压力。

title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
summary: Google is expanding Gemini availability in Chrome to seven new Asian and Pacific countries: Australia, Indonesia, Japan, Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The rollout includes both desktop and iOS versions except in Japan, continuing Google's global strategy to increase AI assistant adoption.
content: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.

zh.title: 谷歌在7个新国家的Chrome中推出Gemini
zh.summary: 谷歌将Gemini在Chrome中的可用性扩展到七个新的亚太国家：澳大利亚、印度尼西亚、日本、菲律宾、新加坡、韩国和越南。此次推出包括桌面和iOS版本（日本除外），是谷歌增加AI助手采用率的全球战略的一部分。

title: John Ternus is taking over from Tim Cook as Apple’s CEO
summary: Apple announced that John Ternus, the company's current hardware engineering chief, will replace Tim Cook as CEO on September 1st, 2026. Tim Cook will transition to executive chairman while Johny Srouji becomes chief hardware officer, marking a significant leadership change after Cook's 15-year tenure.
content:
John Ternus and Tim Cook | Image: Apple	

The multitrillion-dollar home of the iPhone, Mac, and so many other tech gadgets is getting a new leader this fall, as Apple has announced that Tim Cook will be replaced as CEO on September 1st by current hardware boss John Ternus. How will we look back on Cook’s legacy, and what will Apple look like under the leadership of Ternus and new chief hardware officer Johny Srouji?
We’ll keep track of all of the latest updates right here, starting with a live recording of The Vergecast.



					
Read Tim Cook’s letter to the Apple world as he departs as CEO
			
New Apple CEO calls for an emergency Vergecast.
			
Apple names Johny Srouji as chief hardware officer
			
Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down

zh.title: 约翰·特努斯将接任蒂姆·库克成为苹果首席执行官
zh.summary: 苹果宣布，现任硬件工程主管约翰·特努斯将于2026年9月1日接任蒂姆·库克担任首席执行官。库克将转任执行主席，而约翰·斯鲁基将成为首席硬件官，这是库克担任15年后的一次重大领导层变动。

title: Read Tim Cook’s letter to the Apple world as he departs as CEO
summary: Tim Cook addressed the Apple community in a letter as he prepares to step down as CEO in September, expressing gratitude for his 15-year tenure. John Ternus will become CEO while Cook assumes the executive chairman role and Johny Srouji becomes chief hardware officer.
content:
Apple CEO Tim Cook has written a letter to the community as he prepares to step down from his role in September. "This is not goodbye. But at this moment of transition, I wanted to take the opportunity to say thank you," Cook writes.
As part of the shift, John Ternus, Apple's senior vice president of hardware engineering, will take over for Cook, who will become executive chairman. Meanwhile, Johny Srouji is taking over for Ternus and has now been appointed chief hardware officer.
You can read Cook's full letter here: 
To the Apple community:
For the past 15 years I've started just about every morning the same way. I open my email and …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 阅读蒂姆·库克作为首席执行官离职时给苹果世界的信
zh.summary: 蒂姆·库克在为即将于9月卸任首席执行官而准备的一封信中向苹果社群致辞，对其15年的任期表示感谢。约翰·特努斯将成为首席执行官，而库克担任执行主席，约翰·斯鲁基成为首席硬件官。

title: Apple names Johny Srouji as chief hardware officer
summary: Apple appointed Johny Srouji as chief hardware officer, effective immediately, as part of the leadership restructuring following Tim Cook's transition to executive chairman. Srouji moves from SVP of hardware technologies to lead expanded hardware engineering responsibilities previously held by John Ternus.
content:
Apple has appointed Johny Srouji as its new chief hardware officer, "effective immediately," according to an announcement on Monday. He is stepping into the shoes of current hardware engineering head John Ternus, who will replace Tim Cook as CEO in September, while Cook becomes the chairman of the board.
Last December, Srouji reassured his team that he's not "leaving anytime soon" after a flurry of reports suggested he was "evaluating" his future with Apple. However, other notable executives have left Apple over the past year as rumors swirled about Cook's successor, with Sabih Khan taking over for Jeff Williams as chief operating officer a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Apple任命Johny Srouji为首席硬件官
zh.summary: Apple立即任命Johny Srouji为首席硬件官，作为Tim Cook过渡到执行董事长后领导力重组的一部分。Srouji从硬件技术高级副总裁一职晋升，领导之前由John Ternus负责的扩展后的硬件工程职责。

title: John Ternus will replace Tim Cook as Apple CEO
summary: John Ternus will become Apple's CEO while Tim Cook moves to executive chairman, ending Cook's day-to-day operational role at the company. This leadership restructuring positions Ternus to lead the multitrillion-dollar company starting September 1st.
content: Cook will be executive chairman, but will no longer run the company day to day.

zh.title: John Ternus将取代Tim Cook担任Apple首席执行官
zh.summary: John Ternus将成为Apple的首席执行官，而Tim Cook转任执行董事长，结束Cook在公司的日常运营角色。这次领导力重组将使Ternus从9月1日起领导这家估值万亿美元的公司。

title: Absurd study suggests eating fruits and vegetables leads to cancer
summary: A study claiming that eating fruits and vegetables causes cancer has drawn criticism from experts who identified significant methodological flaws, including a small sample size and lack of a control group. The findings contradict established nutritional science, and experts emphasize the study's limitations undermine its credibility.
content: Experts point out a series of flaws, including small size and no control group.

zh.title: 荒谬研究表明食用水果和蔬菜导致癌症
zh.summary: 一项声称食用水果和蔬菜导致癌症的研究遭到专家批评，他们指出了重大的方法论缺陷，包括样本量太小且缺乏对照组。这些发现与既有的营养学相矛盾，专家强调该研究的局限性破坏了其可信度。

title: Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down
summary: Apple announced that Tim Cook will step down as CEO on September 1st, 2026, to be succeeded by John Ternus, the company's senior vice president of hardware engineering. Cook will become executive chairman after 15 years leading Apple and growing it into a $4 trillion business.
content:
Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down and will be succeeded by John Ternus, currently Apple's senior vice president of hardware engineering. Ternus will take over as CEO and join Apple's board of directors on September 1st, 2026. Cook, who joined Apple in 1998 and took over as CEO from Steve Jobs in 2011, will become executive chairman of Apple's board.
Apple has also named Johny Srouji, previously Apple's SVP of hardware technologies, as the company's chief hardware officer, effective immediately. Srouji will "assume an expanded role leading Hardware Engineering, which John Ternus most recently oversaw, as well as the hardware technologies o …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果CEO蒂姆·库克即将卸任
zh.summary: 苹果宣布蒂姆·库克将于2026年9月1日卸任CEO，由该公司硬件工程高级副总裁约翰·特纳斯接任。库克将在领导苹果15年并将其发展成4万亿美元企业后，转任执行主席。

title: Tim Cook stepping down as Apple CEO, John Ternus taking over
summary: Tim Cook is stepping down as Apple CEO, ending one of the longest and most impactful CEO tenures in corporate history. John Ternus will assume the CEO role while Cook transitions to executive chairman, having grown Apple into a $4 trillion company during his 15-year tenure.
content: The transition has been expected for some time and ends one of the longer and more impactful runs a CEO has had at any company. Cook had inherited a company that many industry watchers and enthusiasts struggled to separate from its famed founder. What he leaves behind is a $4 trillion business with annual revenue that has more than quadrupled on his watch.

zh.title: 蒂姆·库克卸任苹果CEO，约翰·特纳斯接任
zh.summary: 蒂姆·库克卸任苹果CEO，结束了企业历史上最长且最具影响力的CEO任期之一。约翰·特纳斯将接任CEO职位，库克则转任执行主席，在其15年的任期内已将苹果发展成4万亿美元的公司。

title: Here’s how Amazon’s price fixing allegedly drove up prices everywhere
summary: California's attorney general released a largely unredacted 16-page document detailing allegations that Amazon engaged in price-fixing schemes to raise competitors' prices and control availability of discounted items. The evidence outlines how Amazon allegedly manipulated pricing around major sales events and coordinated with vendors to prevent lower prices.
content:
On Monday, California Attorney General Rob Bonta revealed the evidence of alleged price-fixing by Amazon. The state filed a request to the Supreme Court in February for a preliminary injunction to stop Amazon's behavior while the lawsuit it originally filed in 2022 proceeds, and is now making that 16-page document available, "largely unredacted." It lays out how Amazon allegedly schemed to raise other retailers' prices ahead of Prime Day, or worked with its vendors to make sure items available at a discount elsewhere were suddenly out of stock and unavailable for the lower price. 
Bonta says this document shows how the scheme works with Ama …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊的价格操纵行为如何被指控导致各地价格上涨
zh.summary: 加州司法部长发布了一份大部分内容已解密的16页文件，详细说明亚马逊被控参与价格操纵计划以抬高竞争对手价格并控制折扣商品供应的指控。证据表明亚马逊涉嫌在大型促销活动期间操纵定价，并与供应商协调以防止降价。

title: Silicon Valley has forgotten what normal people want
summary: A tech industry commentary criticizes how many technologists have become disconnected from what ordinary people actually need, focusing instead on abstract AI discoveries. The piece illustrates how Silicon Valley's priorities, amplified by tech-focused media, diverge from mainstream consumer interests and practical applications.
content:
The long-term risks of the All-In Podcast, illustrated. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Turbosquid, Getty Images	

One of the most mortifying things about knowing a lot of techies is listening to them tell me excitedly about some very important discovery that they believe they have made. Recently, I ran into an acquaintance of mine, who began talking my ear off about an amazing discovery he'd made with LLMs. Knowledge, it turns out, is structured into language! You could put one word into ChatGPT and it might understand what you wanted, or make up a word and see if it understood what you meant! These amazing new tools have revealed that the English corpus contains so much about its speakers!
He concluded that LLMs are a discovery on par with writing. 
 …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 硅谷忘记了普通人想要什么
zh.summary: 一篇科技行业评论批评许多技术工作者与普通人真正需要的东西脱节，转而专注于抽象的人工智能发现。这篇文章说明硅谷的优先事项，由科技媒体放大，与主流消费者利益和实际应用背道而驰。

title: Google Photos adds new touch-up tools for ‘quick’ fixes
summary: Google Photos is introducing new editing tools that allow users to remove blemishes, refine skin texture, brighten eyes, and whiten teeth in photos. These quick-fix features provide one-click improvements for common photo editing tasks.
content: You can use the new tools to remove blemishes, refine skin texture, brighten eyes, or whiten teeth in photos.

zh.title: 谷歌照片新增修饰工具进行快速修复
zh.summary: 谷歌照片推出新的编辑工具，允许用户移除瑕疵、改善皮肤质地、提亮眼睛和美白牙齿。这些快速修复功能为常见的照片编辑任务提供一键改进。

title: WhatsApp tests ‘Plus’ subscription that adds stickers and more for a few bucks a month
summary: Meta is testing a WhatsApp Plus subscription service offering cosmetic and quality-of-life features for approximately €2.49 per month. Subscribers gain access to exclusive sticker packs, custom themes, app icons, premium ringtones, and enhanced chat pinning, similar to Snapchat Plus's paid offering.
content:
WhatsApp Plus subscribers will get access to premium sticker packs. | Image: WABetaInfo	

WhatsApp users are getting some new customization features - for a price. According to WABetaInfo, Meta is rolling out a WhatsApp Plus subscription to "a limited number of users," offering several cosmetic and quality of life perks, including exclusive stickers, different app themes, custom app icons, premium ringtones, the ability to pin up to 20 chats, and the ability to apply custom settings in bulk to lists of chats. 
A screenshot from WABetaInfo shows the subscription's monthly price as €2.49, or just under $3, similar to Snapchat Plus, which costs $3.99 per month and includes similar perks. WhatsApp Plus is currently only supported in …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: WhatsApp测试每月几块钱的"Plus"订阅服务，增加贴纸等功能
zh.summary: Meta正在测试WhatsApp Plus订阅服务，每月约€2.49，提供美化和生活质量功能。订户可以获得独家贴纸包、自定义主题、应用程序图标、高级铃声和增强的聊天固定功能，类似于Snapchat Plus的付费服务。

title: It’s not just one thing — it’s another thing
summary: The phrase "It's not just this — it's that" has become so common in AI-generated writing that it now serves as a nearly definitive marker of synthetic content. The pattern highlights how machine-generated text has developed recognizable stylistic fingerprints.
content: This sentence construction ("It's not just this — it's that") has become so common in AI-generated writing that it's no longer just a clue that a piece of writing may be synthetic — it's almost a guarantee.

zh.title: 不仅仅是一件事——而是另一件事
zh.summary: 短语"这不仅仅是这个——而是那个"在AI生成的文本中变得极为常见,现已成为合成内容几乎明确的标记。这一模式突显了机器生成文本如何形成可识别的风格特征。

title: US opens refund portal to start paying back Trump's illegal tariffs
summary: The U.S. has opened a refund portal allowing importers to reclaim tariffs imposed under Trump's trade policies, following a Supreme Court ruling that deemed the duties illegal. The initiative comes two months after the court's decision against the administration.
content: Importers can now request refunds, two months after Trump's Supreme Court loss.

zh.title: 美国开放退款门户,开始偿还特朗普的非法关税
zh.summary: 美国开放了一个退款门户,允许进口商回收根据特朗普贸易政策征收的关税,此举是在最高法院裁定这些关税违法之后。该举措在法院对政府做出裁决两个月后推出。

title: Here's how F1 is tweaking its hybrid systems to try to save the show
summary: Formula 1 is implementing modifications to its hybrid power systems to address energy management and speed differential problems affecting competitive balance. The technical adjustments aim to improve racing dynamics and sporting integrity.
content: Energy management and speed differentials are the problems of the day.

zh.title: F1如何微调混合动力系统以拯救这场比赛
zh.summary: 一级方程式正在对其混合动力系统进行修改,以解决影响竞争平衡的能源管理和速度差异问题。这些技术调整旨在改善赛车动态和运动竞争的完整性。

title: You can grab a Sonos Era 100 for $85 off thanks to Sonos’ latest refurb sale
summary: Sonos is offering up to 25% off refurbished smart speakers through April 24, with the Era 100 dropping to $134 (normally $219) and the Era 300 to $329 (normally $479), both with one-year warranties. The refurbished Era 100 with voice controls remains substantially cheaper than the new mic-less SL model, making it an attractive option for consumers seeking quality sound without sacrificing hands-free functionality.
content:
The new Sonos Era 100 SL keeps costs down by dropping the mics, but if you’d rather keep hands-free voice controls, picking up a refurbished, non-SL model is the way to go. Thankfully, Sonos is taking up to 25 percent off a range of refurbished gear through April 24th, dropping the price of the Sonos Era 100 to $134 with a one-year warranty. That’s $85 cheaper than buying a new model, and still $55 less than the mic-less SL. If you want bigger, more immersive sound, the Era 300 is also available for $329, which is $150 less than buying it new.
Sonos Era 100 (refurbished)

Where to Buy:

 $179 $134 at Sonos


Sonos Era 300 (refurbished)

Where to Buy:

 $389 $329 at Sonos

Equipped with dual tweeters and a larger midwoofer, Sonos’ midrange smart speaker produces rich, detailed sound that handles bass surprisingly well. It also supports Bluetooth and line-in audio via an optional USB-C adapter, so you can connect external sources such as turntables. You can also use the Era 100 as a reliable assistant, thanks to built-in mics that let you play music, adjust the volume, and perform other hands-free actions via Amazon Alexa or Sonos Voice Control (there’s also a switch on the back to disable the mics entirely).
Like other Sonos speakers, the Era 100 also integrates well with the broader Sonos ecosystem. You can pair two Era 100s for stereo sound, or pair them with a Sonos soundbar. It also supports Apple’s AirPlay 2 and Sonos’ Trueplay tuning, which optimizes sound based on your space.
The Era 300, meanwhile, offers many of the same features — including Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and line-in support — but is a larger, more powerful speaker designed for spatial audio. It delivers more robust sound than the Era 100 thanks to its six drivers and support for Dolby Atmos, making it a better choice if you want a more immersive listening experience, especially in larger rooms or as part of a home theater setup.
Read our full Sonos Era 100 and Era 300 reviews.
Three more deals worth a l

zh.title: 你可以通过Sonos最新翻新产品促销以$85折扣购得Sonos Era 100
zh.summary: Sonos通过4月24日对翻新智能扬声器提供最高25%的折扣，Era 100降至$134（原价$219），Era 300降至$329（原价$479），均附带一年保修。配备语音控制功能的翻新款Era 100价格仍远低于新款无麦克风的SL型号，对于寻求高音质并不想放弃免提功能的消费者来说是一个很有吸引力的选择。

title: Robot runner handily beats humans in half-marathon, setting new record
summary: A humanoid robot has set a new half-marathon record by significantly outperforming human runners, demonstrating China's accelerating progress in robotics technology. The achievement underscores the growing capabilities and speed of autonomous machines.
content: A humanoid robot's record half-marathon run shows China's speed in robotics.

zh.title: 人形机器人轻松击败人类，刷新半程马拉松纪录
zh.summary: 一款人形机器人通过显著超越人类跑步者创造了新的半程马拉松纪录，展示了中国机器人技术的加速进步。这一成就突显了自主机器日益增长的能力和速度。

title: Deezer says AI song uploads have nearly overtaken human music
summary: Deezer receives approximately 75,000 AI-generated song submissions daily, representing 44% of all uploads to the platform. Despite the volume of AI-generated content, these tracks account for only 1-3% of actual streams, as Deezer demonetizes and removes them from its recommendation algorithm, positioning itself as the only major streaming service to systematically tag and restrict AI music.
content:
Deezer says it receives nearly 75,000 AI-generated song submissions to its music streaming platform each day, accounting for about 44 percent of all daily uploads, as reported earlier by TechCrunch. Despite the increase in "fraudulent" uploads, Deezer says the consumption of AI songs makes up around 1 to 3 percent of total streams, as the platform continues to remove AI-generated music from its recommendation algorithm.
Deezer positions the tool as setting an "industry standard," adding that the platform is currently the "only" music streaming service tagging AI-generated tracks. The service also demonetizes AI-generated songs and has stopp …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Deezer表示AI歌曲上传数量已近乎超越人类音乐
zh.summary: Deezer每日收到约75,000首AI生成歌曲提交，占平台所有上传的44%。尽管AI生成内容数量庞大，但这些曲目仅占实际播放流量的1-3%，因为Deezer对其进行去货币化处理并将其从推荐算法中移除，使其成为唯一系统性地标记和限制AI音乐的主要流媒体服务。

title: Deezer says 44% of new music uploads are AI-generated, most streams are fraudulent
summary: Deezer reports that AI-generated tracks now comprise 44% of new daily music uploads to its platform, with most identified as fraudulent and subject to demonetization. The platform continues aggressive measures including removal from recommendation algorithms to combat the surge in automated music submissions.
content: AI tracks account for a small fraction of Deezer streams, and most are demonetized for fraud.

zh.title: Deezer称新音乐上传的44%由AI生成，大多数播放流量为欺诈行为
zh.summary: Deezer报告称AI生成的曲目现已占其平台每日新增音乐上传的44%，其中大多数被识别为欺诈行为并面临去货币化处理。该平台继续采取积极措施，包括从推荐算法中删除此类内容，以遏制自动化音乐提交数量的激增。

title: North Korea hackers blamed for $290M crypto theft
summary: North Korean hackers are blamed for stealing $290 million from Kelp DAO in what is the largest cryptocurrency theft of 2026 so far. The breach highlights ongoing cybersecurity vulnerabilities in the crypto sector despite increasing security measures.
content: The hack against Kelp DAO is the largest crypto heist of the year so far.

zh.title: 朝鲜黑客被控策划2.9亿美元加密货币盗窃案
zh.summary: 朝鲜黑客被指控从Kelp DAO窃取2.9亿美元，这是2026年迄今最大的加密货币盗窃案。这次数据泄露突显了加密货币行业存在的持续网络安全漏洞，尽管安全措施在不断增加。

title: Fortnite developers can make AI characters now — just don’t try to date them
summary: Epic Games is enabling Fortnite creators to build AI-powered non-player characters capable of unscripted dialogue and interactions with players, using simple prompts to define character behavior and personality. The tool represents a significant expansion of AI integration in gaming following last year's controversial AI-voiced Darth Vader character.
content:
Following last year's AI-powered Darth Vader in Fortnite that swore in a re-creation of James Earl Jones' voice, Epic Games is now letting Fortnite creators experiment with a new "conversations" tool to create AI-powered characters that players can talk and interact with.
"Instead of authoring dialogue trees for characters in your islands, conversations transforms an NPC into an AI-powered character capable of unscripted dialogue and interactions with players, like a quest giver or narrator," Epic says. "You define who the character is with simple prompts-how they think, what they know, and how they behave-and then select a voice that match …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Fortnite开发者现在可以创建AI角色了——但不要尝试约会它们
zh.summary: Epic Games正在让Fortnite创作者能够构建由AI驱动的非玩家角色，这些角色能够进行未预设的对话和与玩家的互动，可以使用简单的提示来定义角色行为和个性。这个工具代表了继去年备受争议的AI配音达斯·维达角色之后，游戏中AI集成的重大扩展。

title: Mastodon says its flagship server was hit by a DDoS attack
summary: Mastodon's flagship server was targeted by a distributed denial-of-service attack, continuing a pattern of DDoS targeting social media platforms. The attack occurred less than a week after rival platform Bluesky experienced a similar incident.
content: The DDoS attack against Mastodon's flagship server comes less than a week after Bluesky was targeted with junk web traffic.

zh.title: Mastodon表示其旗舰服务器遭到DDoS攻击
zh.summary: Mastodon的旗舰服务器成为分布式拒绝服务攻击的目标，延续了针对社交媒体平台的DDoS攻击模式。这次攻击发生在竞争对手平台Bluesky经历类似事件的不到一周之后。

title: Rogue Trooper brings the Genetic Infantry to the silver screen
summary: Based on 2000 AD's classic comic series, Rogue Trooper is being adapted into a feature film directed by Duncan Jones, the filmmaker behind the acclaimed film Moon. The project brings the science fiction property to cinema for the first time.
content: The future war film, from the director of Moon, is adapted from 2000 AD's comic series.

zh.title: 《浪客士兵》将遗传步兵搬上银幕
zh.summary: 根据2000 AD经典漫画系列改编，《浪客士兵》被导演邓肯·琼斯改编为故事片。这位以《月球》等获奖佳作闻名的电影人首次将这部科幻作品搬上大银幕。

title: FAA orders investigation into Blue Origin’s New Glenn mishap
summary: The FAA has ordered an investigation into Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket after it failed to deliver a satellite to the correct orbit during its maiden launch on Sunday. The new rocket is grounded pending the outcome of the investigation into the upper-stage malfunction.
content: The New Glenn rocket will have to stay grounded while the company investigates what caused the apparent failure of its upper stage.

zh.title: 美国联邦航空局下令调查蓝色起源新格伦火箭事故
zh.summary: 美国联邦航空局下令调查蓝色起源公司的新格伦火箭，该火箭在周日首次发射时未能将卫星送入预定轨道。该新火箭因上级火箭段故障调查而被禁飞。

title: NSA spies are reportedly using Anthropic’s Mythos, despite Pentagon feud
summary: The NSA is reportedly using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model despite ongoing tensions between Anthropic and the Pentagon. The development underscores the critical role advanced AI systems play in national security operations.
content: NSA is said to be using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model.

zh.title: 据报道NSA特务正在使用Anthropic的Mythos模型，尽管与五角大楼存在纠纷
zh.summary: 据报道，尽管Anthropic与五角大楼存在持续紧张关系，NSA仍在使用Anthropic的限制级Mythos AI模型。这一发展突显了先进AI系统在国家安全行动中的关键作用。

title: Birdfy’s new 4K feeder will teach you about the birds it identifies
summary: Birdfy has released an upgraded version of its camera-equipped bird feeder featuring 4K wide-angle recording, a significant improvement over the original's 1080p capability. The Birdfy Feeder Metal 2 launches today at $269.99 with optional subscription access to AI-powered bird identification features.
content:
Birdfy has announced a new version of its camera-equipped metal feeder with an upgraded camera to make you feel even closer to nature while staring at your phone from the sofa. The Birdfy Feeder Metal 2 has a similar design to the original, using metal panels that animals like squirrels can't chew through to access its 1.8-liter stockpile of seeds. But it now features a 4K wide-angle camera - a big upgrade from the 1080P camera on the original - for capturing and streaming higher-res video. 
The Birdfy Feeder Metal 2 (4K) is launching today for $269.99. You'll need to pay an optional monthly or annual subscription to access the company's AI …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Birdfy的新4K喂食器将教你识别它发现的鸟类
zh.summary: Birdfy发布了升级版的智能相机鸟类喂食器，配备4K超广角录制功能，相比原版1080p有显著提升。Birdfy Feeder Metal 2今日上市，价格为269.99美元，提供可选的AI驱动鸟类识别功能订阅。

title: WhatsApp is testing a premium subscription, but it is mainly cosmetic
summary: WhatsApp is testing a premium subscription service featuring primarily cosmetic enhancements, as Meta continues its strategy of monetizing messaging platforms following the recent Instagram subscription launch. The testing phase indicates Meta's broader push to generate recurring revenue from its communication apps.
content: WhatsApp is testing a subscription after Meta debuted a similar subscription for Instagram earlier this year

zh.title: WhatsApp正在测试高级订阅，但主要是美化功能
zh.summary: WhatsApp正在测试高级订阅服务，主要提供美化功能增强。此举是Meta在最近推出Instagram订阅后继续其消息应用货币化战略的一部分。测试阶段表明Meta正在推动其通讯应用的经常性收入生成。

title: Humanoid ‘Lightning’ robot smashes the half-marathon record
summary: An autonomous humanoid robot named "Lightning" completed a half-marathon in Beijing in 50 minutes and 26 seconds, beating both all 12,000 human competitors and the human world record of 57 minutes. Developed by Honor, the robot features specialized 90-95 cm legs designed to mimic elite human runners and uses liquid cooling technology borrowed from smartphone engineering.
content:
The autonomous “Lightning” robot finished the race in under an hour. | Photo: VCG / Getty Images	

An autonomous scarlet robot named "Lightning" finished a 13-mile race in Beijing on Sunday in just 50 minutes and 26 seconds, less than half the time of last year's fastest robot, which took two hours and 40 minutes. As Reuters reports, Du Xiaodi, one of the engineers who developed Lightning at smartphone company Honor, said the robot "was in development for a year, fitted with legs 90 to 95 cm (35 to 37 inches) long to mimic elite human runners and liquid cooling technology used in its smartphones." 
Lightning not only won the half-marathon, beating all 12,000 human runners, but also beat the human world record of 57 minutes and 20 seconds …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 人形机器人"闪电"打破半程马拉松纪录
zh.summary: 一个名为"闪电"的自主人形机器人在北京完成半程马拉松，耗时50分26秒，超越了全部12,000名人类竞争对手和人类世界纪录57分钟。由荣耀开发的该机器人具有特殊设计的90-95厘米腿部，旨在模仿精英人类跑步者，并使用了源自智能手机工程的液体冷却技术。

title: CEO and CFO suddenly depart AI nuclear power upstart Fermi
summary: The CEO and CFO of Fermi, an AI nuclear power startup co-founded by former Energy Secretary Rick Perry, have unexpectedly departed their positions. The departures reflect ongoing operational challenges as the company works to establish its AI computing campus in Texas.
content: The startup, co-founded by former U.S. Energy Secretary Rick Perry, has faced headwinds with its AI campus in Texas.

zh.title: Fermi的CEO和CFO突然从这家AI核电初创公司离职
zh.summary: AI核电初创公司Fermi的CEO和CFO已意外离职，该公司由前能源部长里克·佩里共同创立。这些离职反映了该公司在德克萨斯州建立AI计算园区过程中持续存在的运营挑战。

title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket grounded after delivering satellite to wrong orbit
summary: The FAA has grounded Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket after it delivered a satellite to an incorrect orbit during its launch on Sunday from Cape Canaveral. While the reusable booster landed successfully, the upper stage failure prevented proper payload deployment, marking a significant setback for the new vehicle.
content:
The Federal Aviation Administration grounded Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket after it shuttled its payload to the wrong orbit during its launch on Sunday, according to a report from the Orlando Sentinel. "The FAA is aware that Blue Origin New Glenn 3 experienced a mishap during the second-stage flight sequence following a successful launch," the FAA said in a statement obtained by the Orlando Sentinel.
On Sunday, the Jeff Bezos-owned Blue Origin successfully launched New Glenn from Cape Canaveral, Florida. Though the rocket's reusable booster returned to its landing pad without issue, the rocket's upper stage failed to deliver AST SpaceMobil …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Blue Origin的New Glenn火箭因将卫星送入错误轨道而被禁飞
zh.summary: FAA已禁飞Blue Origin的New Glenn火箭，该火箭在周日从卡纳维拉尔角发射时将卫星送入了错误的轨道。虽然可重复使用的助推器成功着陆，但上面级失败导致有效载荷无法正确部署，这对新型火箭来说是一次重大挫折。

title: Tesla launches robotaxis in Dallas and Houston, and oops, it’s already unavailable
summary: Tesla announced the launch of its robotaxi service in Dallas and Houston over the weekend, but the service appears largely unavailable as of Sunday evening according to online tracking tools. The gap between the announcement and actual service availability highlights operational challenges in the autonomous vehicle market.
content:
Tesla claims to have launched a robotaxi service in Dallas and Houston over the weekend, but so far, online crowdsourcing tools indicate that very few cars are actually available. 
On Saturday, @TeslaRobotaxi posted a 14-second video of a Model Y vehicle driving without any human safety monitor in the front seats. Elon Musk re-posted the video, adding, "Try Tesla Robotaxi in Dallas & Houston!" 


Try Tesla Robotaxi in Dallas & Houston! https://t.co/K6Ss0S7v4k
- Elon Musk (@elonmusk) April 18, 2026

But as of Sunday evening, the service appeared to be largely unavailable, according to Robotaxi Tracker, an online data site that tracks autonom …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特斯拉在达拉斯和休斯顿推出机器人出租车，但已无法使用
zh.summary: 特斯拉在周末宣布在达拉斯和休斯顿推出其机器人出租车服务，但根据在线追踪工具，该服务在周日晚上似乎基本无法使用。宣传和实际服务可用性之间的差距突显了自动驾驶汽车市场的运营挑战。

title: Meet Bruce, the "beak-jousting" parrot
summary: Bruce, a kea parrot missing his upper beak, has rewritten expectations for disabled animals through adaptive behavior and "beak-jousting" techniques. His case challenges conventional understanding of disability in behaviorally complex species.
content: Kea parrot missing his upper beak "has rewritten what disability means for behaviorally complex species."

zh.title: 认识布鲁斯，"喙刺"鹦鹉
zh.summary: 布鲁斯是一只缺少上喙的啄羊鹦鹉，它通过自适应行为和"喙刺"技术重新定义了对残障动物的期望。他的案例挑战了对行为复杂物种残障的传统理解。

title: Deezer says 44% of songs uploaded to its platform daily are AI-generated
summary: Deezer reports that 44% of daily song uploads are AI-generated, yet actual listener consumption remains between 1-3% with 85% flagged as fraudulent streams. The disparity highlights ongoing platform challenges in managing artificial content.
content: Deezer says consumption of AI-generated music on the platform is still very low, between 1% and 3% of the total streams, and 85% of these streams are detected as fraudulent and are demonetized.

zh.title: Deezer称其平台每日上传的歌曲中44%是AI生成的
zh.summary: Deezer报告称每日上传的歌曲中有44%是AI生成的，但实际听众消费量仅保持在1-3%，其中85%被标记为欺诈流。这一差异突显了平台在管理人工内容方面持续面临的挑战。

title: App host Vercel says it was hacked and customer data stolen
summary: Vercel disclosed a security breach where customer data was stolen after hackers exploited a compromised Context AI employee account to access Vercel systems. The incident illustrates how third-party vulnerabilities can cascade into supply-chain security threats.
content: Vercel blamed its breach on an earlier hack at Context AI, which allowed hackers to hijack a Vercel employee's account to steal customer data.

zh.title: 应用托管服务商Vercel遭黑客入侵，客户数据被窃
zh.summary: Vercel披露了一起安全漏洞事件，黑客通过利用被入侵的Context AI员工账户访问Vercel系统，导致客户数据被盗。该事件表明第三方漏洞如何可能级联演变为供应链安全威胁。

title: Anthropic's Mythos AI model sparks fears of turbocharged hacking
summary: Anthropic's Mythos AI model has sparked security concerns about enabling accelerated cyberattacks that could outpace traditional defensive patching timelines. The development highlights risks associated with increasingly powerful AI systems in adversarial contexts.
content: Cyberdefenses could be exposed faster than fixes could be deployed.

zh.title: Anthropic的Mythos AI模型引发对黑客攻击加速的担忧
zh.summary: Anthropic的Mythos AI模型引发了关于能否加速网络攻击、超过传统防御补丁时间表的安全顾虑。这一发展突显了在对抗环境中日益强大的AI系统所带来的风险。

title: Rivian’s factory hit by tornado ahead of R2 launch
summary: A tornado damaged Rivian's manufacturing facility, specifically affecting the section handling R2 logistics and parts delivery, forcing temporary operational suspension. The company expects to resume operations within the week despite the setback before its R2 vehicle launch.
content: The tornado hit a newer part of the factory, primarily used for R2 logistics such as deliveries of parts. Rivian has paused operations in the building and expects to start back up sometime this week.

zh.title: Rivian工厂在R2车型发布前遭龙卷风袭击
zh.summary: 龙卷风损坏了Rivian的制造设施，特别是处理R2车型物流和零件交付的区域，导致临时停止运营。尽管在R2车型发布前遭遇挫折，该公司预计将在一周内恢复运营。

title: Huawei beats Samsung and Apple to market with the first wide foldable
summary: Huawei has launched the Pura X Max, becoming the first wide-style foldable phone available for purchase, arriving ahead of anticipated devices from Apple and Samsung. Starting at approximately $1,613 for the base model, the phone gives Huawei a crucial first-mover advantage in the emerging foldable phone market.
content:
Huawei’s Pura X Max (pictured) is the first wide-style foldable over the finish line. | Image: Huawei / The Verge	

Huawei has launched its passport-style foldable in China, ahead of similar devices said to be coming from Apple and Samsung. That makes the Pura X Max the first wide foldable phone that's actually available to buy, with today's launch now giving us the full specifications and price after its design was unveiled by Huawei last week. 
There are two versions of the Pura X Max, both of which are available to preorder starting today. The standard version starts at 10999 yuan (about $1,613) for 12GB of memory and 256GB of storage, or 11,999 yuan (about $1,800) for 512GB of storage. The Pura X Max Collector's Edition starts at 12,999 yuan (about $ …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 华为推出首款大屏折叠手机，抢先三星苹果上市
zh.summary: 华为推出Pura X Max，成为首款在市场上出售的大屏风格折叠手机，领先苹果和三星推出的预期设备。该手机基础款售价约1,613美元，为华为在新兴折叠手机市场中提供了关键的先发优势。

title: DJI’s latest power station is proof that good things come in mini packages
summary: DJI released the Power 1000 Mini, a compact power station that reduces the original model's size by half while maintaining its 1kWh battery capacity, making it the smallest from major brands. The device includes features like a built-in retractable USB-C cable and remotely controlled lighting, appealing to users prioritizing portability.
content:
As an avid vanlifer, I have to carefully curate everything I carry in order to eke out every square inch of storage I can to support life off the grid for weeks at a time. That's why I jumped at the chance to review DJI's latest power station.
The DJI Power 1000 Mini is almost half the size of the original DJI Power 1000 released two years ago with the same 1kWh battery capacity. And from my calculations, it's also the smallest 1kWh power station from the major brands that money can currently buy.
DJI's little power station also has a few tricks up its sleeve, including a built-in retractable USB-C cable, a light that can be controlled rem …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 大疆最新电源站证明小而美的产品同样出色
zh.summary: 大疆发布了Power 1000 Mini，一款小巧的电源站，将原始型号的体积减少一半，同时保持1kWh的电池容量，是主要品牌中最小的。该设备包括内置可伸缩USB-C电缆和远程控制照明等功能，吸引了优先考虑便携性的用户。

title: Clarifying HEVC licensing fees, royalties, and why vendors kill HEVC support
summary: This article examines how HEVC video codec licensing agreements function in practice and explains why major vendors have reduced or eliminated HEVC support. Understanding these licensing constraints reveals the complex business and technical factors shaping codec adoption across the industry.
content: How does HEVC implementation really work these days?

zh.title: 阐明HEVC许可费、版税以及为什么供应商停止HEVC支持
zh.summary: 本文探讨了HEVC视频编码器许可协议在实践中的运作方式，并解释了为什么主要供应商减少或停止了HEVC支持。理解这些许可限制揭示了影响整个行业编码器采用的复杂商业和技术因素。

title: GoPro’s new Mission cameras are priced beyond most weekend athletes
summary: GoPro announced the Mission 1 and Mission 1 Pro cameras priced at $599.99 and $699.99 respectively, with a $100 subscription discount positioning them toward professional filmmakers rather than casual weekend users. The cameras launch May 28th, with an interchangeable lens variant arriving later in Q3.
content:
The Mission family. | Image: GoPro	

GoPro is pricing its new Mission 1 and Mission 1 Pro cameras at $599.99 and $699.99, respectively, each discounted by $100 if you subscribe to its ecosystem - fine for professional filmmakers, but a tough sell for weekend warriors.
The Mission 1 and Mission 1 Pro can both be reserved now, and you'll get the $100 Point-and-Shoot Grip accessory for free (while supplies last) ahead of their May 28th release. The Mission 1 Pro ILS, the cam with the interchangeable mount for Micro Four Thirds (MFT) lenses and adapters, will be available later in Q3 for $699.99, or $599.99 for GoPro subscribers.

 
 @verge 
The Verge's video director, Owen Grove,  …


Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: GoPro新款Mission相机价格超出大多数周末爱好者的预算
zh.summary: GoPro发布了Mission 1和Mission 1 Pro相机，定价分别为$599.99和$699.99，并提供$100订阅折扣，将产品定位面向专业电影制作人而非普通周末用户。这两款相机将于5月28日发布，可互换镜头版本将在第三季度晚期推出。
